title: anthemis cretica subsp. iberica
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. iberica, also known as Iberian chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, which belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful for treating digestive issues and anxiety. The health benefits of Iberian chamomile include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Iberian chamomile can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, calm the nervous system, and promote a restful night's sleep.
